question: What are the initial onboarding steps?
answer: The initial onboarding steps are: 1) Attend initial onboarding training by HR, 2) Get in touch with your reporting manager, 3) Contact your assigned 'Buddy'.

question: How do I get my system access credentials?
answer: Check your personal email (the one you provided to the company) for an email containing: US Domain ID, Temporary password, and 4-digit IT desk pin. Keep the IT desk pin handy at all times. A copy is also sent to your manager.

question: What if I can't find my credentials email?
answer: A copy of the credentials email is also sent to your manager. Contact your manager if you can't find it in your personal email.

question: What documents do I need for my temporary ID on the first day?
answer: You need two documents for temporary ID access: 1) Aadhar card, 2) Vaccination certificate.

question: Who do I contact to get my laptop?
answer: Contact Kiran at Kiran.Vk@carelon.com. The Asset team is located on the 5th floor (Tech Bar) in Bagmane office, Bangalore. You need approval mail from HR & Manager before contacting them.

question: Where is the Asset team located?
answer: The Asset team is located on the 5th floor (Tech Bar) in Bagmane office, Bangalore.

question: What is Kiran's email for laptop and assets?
answer: Kiran's email is Kiran.Vk@carelon.com. Contact Kiran for assistance with laptop and asset collection.

question: How do I apply for a permanent ID card?
answer: First, check if HR has raised a request for your ID card. You'll need manager approval. If you need additional building access for a specific location, raise a request from the Insync portal.

question: What do I need to prepare for team introduction?
answer: Prepare a 1-slide PowerPoint presentation introducing yourself to the team.

question: How do I request VPN access?
answer: Raise an IT Service Connect request for VPN access. Your manager will need to approve it.

question: What trainings do I need to complete?
answer: You need to complete: 1) Mandatory training for new joiners, 2) Additional UX team trainings for Figma, 3) Healthcare System Structure document for high-level business understanding.

question: What is TCP access and how do I get it?
answer: TCP access requires a Product code (PRJ Code) assigned by your manager. Contact your manager to get this assigned.

question: Where do I fill my timesheet?
answer: Fill your timesheet in Service Now using the Timesheet link. This is used for billing and timesheet purposes.

question: What is the timesheet link?
answer: The timesheet is filled through Service Now. Use the Service Now Timesheet link for billing and timesheet entries.

question: What is BCP and what is it used for?
answer: BCP (Business Continuity Planning) is accessed through Insync BCP Link. It's used for access requests including Building access, Asset requests, and Relocation requests.

question: What is Service Now used for?
answer: Service Now is used for accessing all information related to your profile under the organization. Access it through the Service-now Link.

question: What is Pulse Portal?
answer: Pulse Portal (pulse.elevancehealth.com) is the Carelon associates portal for various personal tasks related to HR, IT, Business, and Seat reservations.

question: What is Workday used for?
answer: Workday is used for: 1) Adding bank details, 2) Time entry, 3) Applying for leave, 4) Setting goals.

question: How do I view my salary?
answer: Use the Payroll Portal to view 'My Pay' and apply for declarations.

question: Where do I complete mandatory trainings?
answer: Complete mandatory trainings through Workday Learning.

question: What is Chrome River used for?
answer: Chrome River is used for all types of claims including Internet reimbursement, Relocation reimbursement, and other expense claims.

question: What is IT Service Connect?
answer: IT Service Connect (Elevancehealth.service-now.com) is used for: 1) Raising software license requests, 2) Requesting ID cards, 3) Requesting design applications, 4) Raising building access requests.

question: How do I request software licenses?
answer: Raise a request through IT Service Connect at Elevancehealth.service-now.com.

question: What is Pulse Point used for?
answer: Pulse Point is used for apps related to Badge access and Reservation of seats. Use Pulse Point Spaces to reserve a seat for your respective office.

question: How do I reserve a seat at the office?
answer: Use Pulse Point Spaces to reserve a seat for your respective office.

question: How do I set up company cab transport?
answer: Raise a request by emailing the transport team for your office location. Then install the Move Insync application on your phone for booking and managing travel.

question: What is the transport email for Hyderabad office?
answer: For Hyderabad office, email DL-TransportHYD@carelon.com to set up transport.

question: What is the transport email for Bangalore MTP office?
answer: For Bangalore MTP office, email dl-TransportMTP@carelon.com to set up transport.

question: What is the transport email for Bangalore Bagmane office?
answer: For Bangalore Bagmane office, email dl-transportxenon@carelon.com to set up transport.

question: What is the transport email for Gurugram office?
answer: For Gurugram office, email dl-TransportGUR@carelon.com to set up transport.

question: What app do I use for cab booking?
answer: Install the Move Insync application on your phone for booking and managing your company cab travel.

question: How do I order food at the office?
answer: Install the Hunger Box application on your phone. Login with your Domain ID and set up your profile to order food at any office premise.

question: What is Hunger Box?
answer: Hunger Box is the food ordering application. Install it on your phone and login with your Domain ID to order food at any office premise.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Connect with IT Enterprise for password reset assistance.

question: What is PingID?
answer: PingID is an authentication app you need to install. Contact IT Enterprise for setup assistance.

question: Who do I contact for design system questions?
answer: Contact the Design System team or use the Carelon DS UX Team channel for communication.

question: What design library should I use?
answer: Currently, Lean IDS is the library every designer must follow.

question: What is Lean IDS?
answer: Lean IDS is the design system library that every designer at Carelon must follow for consistency.

question: Who is my onboarding buddy?
answer: Your onboarding buddy is assigned by your manager or HR. Check with them to get your buddy's contact information.

question: What is my Domain ID?
answer: Your Domain ID (US Domain ID) is sent to your personal email along with your temporary password and IT desk pin. Check the email from the company.

question: Where can I find my IT desk pin?
answer: Your 4-digit IT desk pin is sent to your personal email along with your Domain ID and temporary password. Keep it handy at all times.

question: What is the first thing I should do on Day 1?
answer: On Day 1, you should: 1) Get your temporary ID (bring Aadhar card and vaccination certificate), 2) Collect your laptop and assets from the Asset team, 3) Meet your buddy and manager.

question: What should I do on Day 2-3?
answer: On Day 2-3, you should: 1) Join team channels and introduce yourself, 2) Attend team standup, 3) Explore the Figma workspace.

question: What should I do on Day 4-5?
answer: On Day 4-5, you should: 1) Start your first training module, 2) Get project context from the team, 3) Attend your first design sync.

question: How do I get building access?
answer: Raise a building access request through IT Service Connect or the Insync portal (BCP) depending on your needs.

question: What approvals do I need for laptop collection?
answer: You need approval mail from both HR and your Manager to collect your laptop from the Asset team.

question: Where is the Pulse Portal?
answer: The Pulse Portal is at pulse.elevancehealth.com. It's the main portal for HR, IT, and business tasks.

question: What is my PRJ Code?
answer: Your PRJ Code (Product code) is assigned by your manager for TCP access. Contact your manager to get it.

question: How do I apply for leave?
answer: Apply for leave through Workday. Login to Workday and use the leave application feature.

question: How do I add my bank details?
answer: Add your bank details through Workday. This is required for salary payments.

question: What is the IT Service Connect link?
answer: The IT Service Connect link is Elevancehealth.service-now.com. Use it for all IT-related requests.

question: Who approves my VPN request?
answer: Your manager approves your VPN request after you raise it through IT Service Connect.

question: What is the Carelon DS UX Team channel?
answer: The Carelon DS UX Team channel is the communication channel for the Design System team. Use it for design system questions and support.

question: How do I get Figma training?
answer: Figma training is part of the additional UX team trainings. Your manager or buddy will guide you to the training resources.

question: What is the Healthcare System Structure document?
answer: The Healthcare System Structure document provides high-level understanding of the business. It's part of your UX team training materials.

question: Do I need vaccination certificate?
answer: Yes, you need a vaccination certificate for first-time temporary ID access on your first day at the office.

question: What happens if I need relocation assistance?
answer: For relocation assistance, raise a request through BCP (Insync portal) or claim reimbursement through Chrome River.

question: How do I claim internet reimbursement?
answer: Claim internet reimbursement through Chrome River. It handles all types of claims including internet expenses.

question: What is Move Insync?
answer: Move Insync is the application for booking and managing your company cab travel. Install it on your phone after setting up transport.

question: Can I get assistance with asset collection?
answer: Yes, contact Kiran at Kiran.Vk@carelon.com if you need assistance with laptop and asset collection.

question: What is Insync portal?
answer: Insync portal is used for BCP (Business Continuity Planning) requests including building access, asset requests, and relocation. Access it through the Insync BCP Link.

question: How many slides should my intro presentation be?
answer: Your team introduction presentation should be 1 slide only.

question: What is the Asset team's floor number?
answer: The Asset team is located on the 5th floor (Tech Bar) in Bagmane office, Bangalore.

question: Which office is the Asset team in?
answer: The Asset team is in the Bagmane office in Bangalore.
